text_snippet: 1. Human life shall be protected. The death penalty shall be prohibited. 2. The physical integrity of a person shall be protected.

article_id: Article 25. Right to hold public office
text_snippet: 1. Every citizen of Georgia shall have the right to hold any public office if the individual meets the requirements established by legislation. Conditions for civil service shall be determined by law.

article_id: Article 26. Freedom of labour, freedom of trade unions, right to strike and freedom of enterprise
text_snippet: 1. Freedom of labour shall be guaranteed. Everyone has the right to freely choose their employment. The right to safe working conditions and other labour rights shall be protected by the organic law.

text_snippet: The constitutional bodies shall take all measures within the scope of their competences to ensure the full integration of Georgia into the European Union and the North Atlantic Treaty Organization.
